summary: Comprehensive testing of P2P Exchange new UI features (Tasks 5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11, 13). All backend APIs passed (16/16 tests). Frontend UI verified for main page offer list, forum search, chat features, referral page, and requisites page.
passed_tests: Backend: Public offers endpoint returns offers with limits fields (min_amount, max_amount) - PASSED
Backend: Offers have available_usdt and price_rub for USDT+RUB display - PASSED
Backend: Offers have requisites with type field for payment type display - PASSED
Backend: CIS requisite type can be created - PASSED
Backend: Forum messages endpoint accessible - PASSED
Backend: Forum auto-moderation blocks spam keywords (продаю) - PASSED
Backend: Forum auto-moderation blocks external links (https://) - PASSED
Backend: Forum auto-moderation blocks telegram links (t.me/) - PASSED
Backend: User search by nickname works - PASSED
Backend: Conversations endpoint returns list - PASSED
Backend: Delete conversation endpoint exists - PASSED
Backend: Referral info endpoint returns code, link, earnings, count - PASSED
Backend: Create conversation between traders works - PASSED
Backend: Send private message works - PASSED
Frontend: Main page shows Limits column (ЛИМИТЫ) - PASSED
Frontend: Main page shows Available with USDT + RUB equivalent (≈ X ₽) - PASSED
Frontend: Main page shows Payment type (Банковская карта, СБП, Перевод СНГ) not bank names - PASSED
Frontend: Main page has NO T&C visible (Task 6) - PASSED
Frontend: Forum search toggle button works - PASSED
Frontend: Forum search input filters messages - PASSED
Frontend: Forum shows 'X из Y сообщений' when filtering - PASSED
Frontend: Chat page shows General chat pinned at top with 📌 indicator - PASSED
Frontend: Chat page has NO user list visible by default - PASSED
Frontend: Chat search placeholder says 'Поиск по никнейму...' - PASSED
Frontend: Chat page has delete buttons for conversations - PASSED
Frontend: Referral page shows promo banner with '💰 Пассивный доход без усилий' - PASSED
Frontend: Referral page shows benefits (Без ограничений, Мгновенные выплаты, Неограниченное число) - PASSED
Frontend: Referral page shows stats (Заработано, Рефералов, Ставка 0.5%) - PASSED
Frontend: Requisites page shows CIS transfer section (🌍 Перевод СНГ) - PASSED
Frontend: Requisites page shows CIS description (Банковский перевод в страны СНГ) - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. CIS requisites already exist for trader account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new UI features tested and working: 1) Task 5 - Main page offer list shows Limits column, Available with USDT+RUB, Payment type (not bank). CIS requisite type available in /trader/requisites. 2) Task 6 - No T&C visible on main page. 3) Task 7 - Chat by nickname only, no user list, search placeholder 'Поиск по никнейму...'. 4) Task 8 - Forum search toggle and filter working. 5) Task 10 - General chat pinned at top with 📌, delete chat buttons visible on hover. 6) Task 11 - Forum auto-moderation blocks spam keywords and links, bans user for 24h. 7) Task 13 - Referral page shows promo banner with passive income text and benefits.
